content: [{'text': 'Now I can see the robot is at (4.60, 11.88) and is very close to the black wall below. The green destination is directly below at (3.98, 7.87). I need to find a way south. Looking at the map, the robot appears to be near the left edge of the upper corridor. I need to turn south (rotate -90° clockwise) to look for a passage downward. But first let me check — the LiDAR says front is clear, but I can see the black wall is very close below (south). \n\nI need to turn south to find a passage. The robot is facing west. To turn south, I need to rotate **-90°** (clockwise/right).', 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_012TENjJDto83QQWgDTzTYsA', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
